name: ConnectiveGeometry
summary: A class for geometry formed of several geometry sections. Geometry is initialized with polygon geometry and then can be extended by calling one of AddLeg methods using BentPlateGeometrySolver class. In the case of success, two polygon geometries will be connected by cylindrical surface geometry possibly with help of additional polygon geometries. Resulted geometry, then, can be set to bent plate.

constructors.name: ConnectiveGeometry
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ConnectiveGeometry class for a stand-alone bend creation.

constructors.name: ConnectiveGeometry
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ConnectiveGeometry class.

methods.name: GetConnection
methods.summary: Returns 2 connecting line segments between geometrySection1 and geometrySection2 sections, if sections are connected, otherwise returns empty list.

methods.name: GetGeometryEnumerator
methods.summary: Gets a new geometry sections enumerator for enumerating through the geometry sections.

methods.name: GetGeometryLegSections
methods.summary: Gets geometry end GeometrySections which are possible to remove.

methods.name: GetNeighborSections
methods.summary: Gets neighbor sections of the geometrySection inside this ConnectiveGeometry.

methods.name: IsEmpty
methods.summary: Checks whether the geometry is degenerate
